metadata.description: Visa policy eligibility and document requirements

policies.eligibility:
SUBCLASS 101 - CHILD VISA (OFFSHORE):
- Purpose: Child outside Australia moves to Australia to live with parent(s)
- Stay: Permanent residence
- Cost: From AUD 3,235
SUBCLASS 802 - CHILD VISA (ONSHORE):
- Purpose: Child already in Australia stays permanently with parent(s)
- Stay: Permanent residence
- Cost: From AUD 3,235
SUBCLASS 102 - ADOPTION VISA:
- Purpose: Child adopted (or in process of adoption) outside Australia moves to Australia with adoptive parent
- Stay: Permanent residence
- Cost: From AUD 3,235
SUBCLASS 115 - REMAINING RELATIVE VISA (OFFSHORE):
- Purpose: Person moves to Australia to be with their only close family members
- Stay: Permanent residence
- Cost: From AUD 5,280
- Queue wait: Up to 50 years (Other Family Visa Queue)
SUBCLASS 835 - REMAINING RELATIVE VISA (ONSHORE):
- Purpose: Person already in Australia stays to be with only close family members
- Stay: Permanent residence
- Cost: From AUD 5,280
- Queue wait: Up to 50 years (Other Family Visa Queue)
SUBCLASS
required_documents: Medical examination required for all permanent family visa applicants
Must be done by Bupa Medical Visa Services panel physician
Includes chest x-ray (age 11+), HIV test (age 15+), full medical (age 75+)
Police certificate required from every country lived in 12+ months during past 10 years (since age 16)

policies.eligibility:
- Stay: Up to 6 years, aligned with course duration
- Cost: From AUD 2,000 (exemptions for Pacific Island/Timor-Leste citizens from 22 March 2025)
- Apply: Online via ImmiAccount, inside or outside Australia
- Processing: Prioritized per Ministerial Direction 111 (before 14 Nov 2025) or 115 (on/after 14 Nov 2025)
□ Apply online in or outside Australia
□ Be enrolled in CRICOS-registered course and hold valid Confirmation of Enrolment (CoE) at decision time
□ Be 6 years or older
□ Prove approved welfare arrangements if under 18
required_documents: Passport holders: UK, USA, Canada, New Zealand, Republic of Ireland
8501 – MAINTAIN HEALTH INSURANCE: Hold adequate OSHC for entire stay
Passport (valid for intended stay)
Financial evidence (bank statements, loan docs, scholarship letter)
Police certificates (if requested)
Must present: Passport with visa grant notice, CoE, OSHC confirmation, proof of funds if requested

policies.eligibility:
□ Intend to come to Australia for a genuine temporary visit only
□ Have sufficient funds to cover stay + return travel
□ Not intend to work in Australia (volunteer work may be permitted in limited cases)
□ Be outside Australia when applying AND when visa decision is made
required_documents: Purpose and plausibility of visit: itinerary, bookings, invitation letters
Bank statements (last 3-6 months) showing consistent balance
MEDICAL EXAMINATION MAY BE REQUIRED IF:
Must be completed by Bupa Medical Visa Services panel physician
May be required for stays >3 months or if medical exam waived
POLICE CERTIFICATE REQUIRED IF:
Most applicants must provide fingerprints and photo at Visa Application Centre (VAC)
2. Complete Visitor Visa (subclass 600) application form
7. If granted: print visa grant notice; carry with passport when traveling
Must present: passport with visa grant notice, return/onward ticket, proof of funds if requested
Officer may grant shorter stay than visa validity; date will be stamped in passport

policies.eligibility:
□ Be nominated by an approved sponsor to work in an occupation on the Core Skills Occupation List (CSOL)
□ Be paid at least the Core Skills Income Threshold (CSIT) OR Annual Market Salary Rate (AMSR), whichever is higher
□ Have at least 1 year relevant work experience in nominated occupation or related field
□ Meet minimum standards of English language proficiency (Competent English: IELTS 5.0 or equivalent)
□ Work only for sponsor or associated entity (unless exempt)
INCOME THRESHOLD (2024-2025):
- AUD 73,150 per year (indexed annually)
OCCUPATION LIST:
- Core Skills Occupation List (CSOL)
- Covers most skilled occupations facing shortages
required_documents: Stay: Up to 4 years (Up to 5 years for Hong Kong passport holders)
Passport holders from: UK, USA, Canada, New Zealand, Republic of Ireland
Some applicants exempt if holding specific passports or high salary
Medical examination required for all applicants
Must be done by Bupa Medical Visa Services panel physician
Health insurance strongly recommended
Police certificate required from every country lived in 12+ months during past 10 years
3. DOCUMENTS: Upload via ImmiAccount (passport, skills assessment, English test, police certs, health exam)
4. BIOMETRICS: Provide fingerprints/photo at VAC if requested
8501 – HEALTH INSURANCE: Must maintain adequate health insurance for stay duration
English waiver: For high-income earners (Specialist Skills) or specific passports
Age waiver: For PR pathway in specific circumstances (e.g., academic, medical)
Must maintain health insurance throughout stay

policies.eligibility:
□ Be at least 18 years old
□ Be a Canadian citizen, permanent resident, or person registered under Canadian Indian Act
□ Live in Canada (citizens abroad may sponsor if proving intent to return; PRs abroad cannot sponsor)
□ Sign undertaking and sponsorship agreement committing to financial support
- Sponsoring a dependent child who has their own dependent child(ren), OR
- Sponsoring a spouse/partner who has a dependent child, and that child has dependent child(ren)
required_documents: Marriage certificate + wedding photos
Joint financial documents (bank accounts, leases, bills, insurance)
Medical condition posing public health/safety risk OR excessive demand on services
Proof of Canadian status (citizenship certificate, PR card, Indian Act registration)
Marriage certificate / proof of common-law/conjugal relationship
Birth certificates for dependent children
Police certificates from all countries lived in 6+ months since age 18
Immigration medical exam results (IRCC-approved panel physician)
Photos meeting IRCC specifications
Requirements: Child/grandchild in Canada meets income threshold, private medical insurance ($100k coverage), medical exam

policies.eligibility:
□ Be enrolled at a Designated Learning Institution (DLI)
□ Prove sufficient funds for: tuition + living expenses ($20,635 CAD for single applicant) + return transportation for self and family members
□ Prove to officer that they will leave Canada when study permit expires
required_documents: Obey the law, have no criminal record; obtain police certificate if required
Be in good health; complete medical exam if required
Copy of valid passport or travel document (information page)
2 recent passport-size photos (name + DOB written on back)
Guaranteed Investment Certificate (GIC) from participating institution
Bank statements (past 4-6 months)
6. MEDICAL EXAM (If required)
7. POLICE CERTIFICATE (If required)
Fingerprints + photo taken at Visa Application Centre (VAC)
Leads to degree, diploma, or certificate
Biometrics and medical exam (if required) add to total processing time
Visitor visa or eTA: Allows you to travel to Canada (placed in passport)

policies.eligibility:
- Visa is placed in passport; shows applicant meets entry requirements
=== ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA ===
APPLICANT MUST PROVE:
□ Are law-abiding with no criminal record (police certificate may be required)
□ Are in good health (medical exam may be required)
□ Will not overstay or violate visa conditions
=== DOCUMENTS REQUIRED ===
- Additional documents required if traveling with one parent, relative, friend, or alone
- Required for most applicants aged 18-79
- Must be done in person at Visa Application Centre (VAC)
required_documents: Visa is placed in passport; shows applicant meets entry requirements
Visa officer decides: single/multiple entry, validity period (up to 10 years or passport/biometrics expiry)
Standard stay: up to 6 months (border officer may adjust; date stamped in passport or on visitor record)
Are law-abiding with no criminal record (police certificate may be required)
Are in good health (medical exam may be required)
Bank statements (last 4-6 months)
Valid passport (regular, official, diplomatic) from most countries
Alien's passport for stateless persons
Passports issued by Somalia
Non-machine-readable passports from Czech Republic
Temporary passports from Republic of South Africa
Provisional passports from Venezuela
INVITATION LETTER (IF VISITING FAMILY/FRIENDS):
May grant stay < or > 6 months; date stamped in passport or issued on visitor record
If no stamp/date given: default stay is 6 months from entry OR until passport/biometrics expiry

policies.eligibility:
- Validity: Usually matches the duration of the student's study permit
SPOUSE/COMMON-LAW PARTNER MAY APPLY IF STUDENT IS:
□ Studying in a Master's degree program of 16 months or longer
□ Studying in a Doctoral degree program (PhD)
□ Studying in one of the following professional degree programs at a university:
- Doctor of Dental Surgery (DDS, DMD)
- Bachelor of Law or Juris Doctor (LLB, JD, BCL)
- Doctor of Medicine (MD)
- Doctor of Optometry (OD)
- Pharmacy (PharmD, BS, BSc, BPharm)
- Doctor of Veterinary Medicine (DVM)
- Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BScN, BSN)
- Bachelor of Nursing Science (BNSc)
- Bachelor of Nursing (BN)
- Bachelor of Education (BEd)
- Bachelor of Engineering (BEng, BE, BASc)
required_documents: Must provide proof (joint leases, bills, insurance, etc.)
Studying in a College Diploma or Certificate program
Marriage certificate (for spouses)
Photos, communication records (supporting evidence)
Medical exam (if required based on country/job)
Police certificate (if required)
Biometrics and medical exam (if required) add to processing time

policies.eligibility:
- Sponsored by family member legally residing in China (foreigner with Work/Student Residence Permit OR Chinese citizen)
□ Be a foreign national holding valid Work (Z) or Student (X1) Residence Permit in China, OR
□ Be a Chinese citizen with household registration (hukou) or valid Chinese ID
□ Have stable residence and sufficient financial means to support visiting family member
□ Not have adverse immigration or legal history in China
□ Children: Unmarried children under 18 of sponsor or sponsor's spouse
□ Parents: Parents of sponsor (for S1 Visa with foreign sponsor; more flexible for Chinese citizen sponsor)
required_documents: Spouse: Legally married to sponsor (marriage certificate required)
Completed online visa application form (https://cova.cs.mfa.gov.cn)
Printed and signed application form with recent passport photo attached:
Photo specs: 48mm x 33mm, white background, frontal view
Original passport (valid 6+ months beyond intended stay, 2 blank pages)
Photocopy of passport biodata page
Invitation letter from sponsor in China:
If sponsor is foreigner: Copy of sponsor's passport, valid Residence Permit, employment/student proof
If sponsor is Chinese citizen: Copy of Chinese ID (front/back) or passport + household registration proof
Spouse: Attested marriage certificate (translated to Chinese if not in Chinese/English)
Children: Attested birth certificate showing parentage
Parents: Birth certificate of sponsor + proof of relationship
Health Examination Certificate (for S1 Visa applicants planning stay >180 days):
Proof of financial means: Sponsor's bank statements, employment letter, or applicant's own funds
All standard visa documents (application form, passport, photo)

policies.eligibility:
- X1 Visa holders must convert to Residence Permit within 30 days of entry
- Sponsored by Chinese educational institution; requires Admission Notice + JW201/JW202 Form
=== ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA ===
NON-QUALIFYING PROGRAMS:
=== DOCUMENT REQUIREMENTS ===
- Report valid for 6 months; must include chest X-ray, blood tests, physical exam
□ JW202 Form (if applicable; some short-term programs may not require)
3. Print, sign, and gather all required documents (originals + photocopies)
4. Submit application at Chinese Embassy/Consulate or CVASC (appointment required)
- Must apply at local Exit-Entry Administration Bureau of Public Security within 30 days of entry

All standard visa documents (application form, passport, photo)
3. Print, sign, and gather all required documents (originals + photocopies)

Passport with X1 Visa + entry stamp

policies.eligibility:
=== ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA ===
=== DOCUMENT REQUIREMENTS ===
3. Gather all required documents (originals + photocopies)
- Appointment required at most locations; book via CVASC website
ENTRY/EXIT REQUIREMENTS:
- Must enter China within visa validity period
- Must exit before "Duration of Each Stay" expires
- Foreign tourists MUST obtain Tibet Travel Permit in addition to Chinese visa
- Permit required for entry to Tibet by air, train, or road
- Certain border regions (Xinjiang, Yunnan, Guangxi) may require additional permits
required_documents: Hold passport valid for at least 6 months beyond intended stay, with at least 2 blank visa pages
Not be of Pakistani origin or hold Pakistani passport without special clearance (case-by-case)
Completed online visa application form (https://cova.cs.mfa.gov.cn)
Printed and signed application form with recent passport photo attached:
Photo specs: 48mm x 33mm, white background, frontal view, no glasses/headwear (except religious)
Original passport (valid 6+ months, 2+ blank pages)
Photocopy of passport biodata page and previous Chinese visas (if applicable)
Hotel reservations or invitation letter from host in China:
If staying with host: Invitation letter + host's Chinese ID/residence permit copy + proof of relationship
Bank statements (last 3-6 months) showing sufficient funds (~USD 100-150/day recommended)
2. Print, sign, and attach photo to application form
3. Gather all required documents (originals + photocopies)
7. Collect passport with visa sticker or receive via courier if service available
L Visa generally NOT extendable within China except in exceptional circumstances (medical emergency, force majeure)

policies.eligibility:
□ Be legally residing in France for at least 18 months with valid residence permit
□ Have stable, regular resources meeting minimum thresholds

Child's age proof (passport, birth certificate)

Documents: Relationship proof, French nationality proof, sufficient means, accommodation, travel insurance
Medical insurance covering first 3 months
Evidence of actual contribution: financial transfers, school involvement, medical care, correspondence
EU national's passport/ID card proving nationality
Proof of family relationship: marriage/birth certificate (translated if needed)
Marriage certificates, birth certificates, adoption decrees must be:

Insufficient proof of financial means or health insurance

policies.eligibility:

- Long-stay (>90 days): Long-stay visitor visa (VLS-TS) serving as residence permit

IMPORTANT: French public health system does NOT cover visa holders; all medical costs are patient responsibility.
Provide biometrics (fingerprints + photo) if aged 12+

=== CORE DOCUMENT REQUIREMENTS (ALL PURPOSES) ===
□ Policy must show applicant's name and DOB

policies.eligibility:
□ Be registered with FRRO/FRO if stay >180 days

✗ Siblings, adult married children, unrelated companions cannot be sponsored on Entry (X) Visa
✗ Dependents cannot engage in independent employment without separate Employment Visa

policies.eligibility:
- 166+ countries including USA, UK, Canada, Australia, most EU nations, Japan, Singapore, UAE, etc.
- Full list: https://indianvisaonline.gov.in/evisa/tvoa.html
e-VISA SUB-CATEGORIES & VALIDITY:
1. e-Tourist Visa (30 days):
- Validity: 30 days from date of arrival
- Entries: Double entry
- Fee: USD 25 (varies by nationality)
2. e-Tourist Visa (1 year):
- Validity: 365 days from date of grant
- Entries: Multiple entry
- Max stay per visit: 90 days (180 days for USA/UK/Canada/Japan citizens)
- Fee: USD 40 (varies by nationality)
3. e-Tourist Visa (5 years):
- Validity: 5 years from date of grant
- Entries: Multiple entry
- Max stay per visit: 90 days (180 days for USA/UK/Canada/Japan citizens)
- Fee: USD 80 (varies by nationality)
required_documents: Tourist visa for recreation, sightseeing, casual visit to meet friends/relatives, short-duration medical treatment, casual business visit
Hold passport valid for at least 6 months from date of arrival in India
Have at least 2 blank pages in passport for stamping
Not be of Pakistani origin or hold Pakistani passport (special rules apply)
Not be a diplomat/official passport holder (different visa category)
Scanned copy of passport biodata page (PDF, max 300KB)
Recent passport-sized photograph (JPEG, white background, 2x2 inches, max 1MB)
Proof of accommodation in India (hotel booking, invitation letter)
Bank statements (last 3 months) showing sufficient funds
For medical tourism: Letter from recognized Indian hospital
Completed online application form (https://indianvisaonline.gov.in)
Original passport (valid 6+ months, 2 blank pages)
Two recent passport-sized photographs (2x2 inches, white background)
Proof of financial means: Bank statements (last 3-6 months)
Invitation letter from host in India (if visiting friends/relatives)

policies.eligibility:
